name: frontend-design-workflow
description: Framework-guided UI/UX and frontend design skills for web, desktop, and cross-platform product interfaces.

interface.shortDescription: Plan, build, and verify accessible web and desktop UI.
interface.longDescription: Frontend Design Workflow provides Codex skills for broad UI/UX and frontend design work across web apps, Windows and macOS desktop apps, SaaS tools, dashboards, internal productivity software, consumer products, and cross-platform interfaces. It covers UX strategy, information architecture, design systems, frontend architecture, accessibility review, implementation, platform adaptation, and visual QA.
defaultPrompt: Use the frontend design skills to plan and build this UI.
Review this frontend for accessibility and design quality.
Design a polished cross-platform app interface.
